acceptance_criteria: All process artifact contracts exist in schemas/contracts/v1.
Rust process artifact mirrors round-trip through serde and appear in the embedded schema registry.

open_questions.question: Contract field sets stay additive and aligned with the validator.

objective: Review existing contract and codegen patterns.
findings: Contract schemas use a flat name/version/fields format.
The contracts crate mirrors schemas as Rust structs.
constraints: New process contracts must remain additive.
Schema embedding tests must be updated with the new count.
